title: On A Schoolmaster.
content:
Here lie Willie Michie's banes;
            O, Satan! when ye tak' him,
        Gi' him the schoolin' o' your weans,
            For clever de'ils he'll mak' them.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "On A Schoolmaster.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
